name: web-scraper
description: Intelligent web scraper for extracting blog/news content from any website

interface.shortDescription: Extract article content from blog and news sites with LLM-ready output.
interface.longDescription: Scrape single URLs or batches of URLs from blogs and news sites. Returns clean article text, token counts, and chunked output sized for downstream LLM ingestion. Auto-discovers RSS feeds and sitemaps when only a domain is given. Uses Mozilla Readability for extraction with Playwright fallback for JS-rendered pages.
